lightsail.loadbalancertlscertificate.Cer.Description: An array of alternative domain names and subdomain names for your SSL/TLS certificate.  In addition to the primary domain name, you can have up to nine alternative domain names. Wildcards (such as `*.example.com`) are not supported.
The domain name for the SSL/TLS certificate. For example, `example.com` or `www.example.com`.
The name of the SSL/TLS certificate.

lightsail.loadbalancertlscertificate.IsA.Description: A Boolean value indicating whether the SSL/TLS certificate is attached to a Lightsail load balancer.

lightsail.loadbalancertlscertificate.Loa.Description: The name of the load balancer that the SSL/TLS certificate is attached to.
